basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Madras is recruiting 01 Project Associate-I in the Department of Mechanical Engineering on a contractual basis.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | preference: Candidates with CSIR-UGC NET / GATE / National Level Exam qualification
qualification.education_qualification: 4-year Bachelor’s degree in Natural/Agricultural Sciences OR Master’s degree in Natural/Agricultural Sciences OR Bachelor’s degree in Engineering/Technology/Medicine from a recognized university
qualification.nationality: Indian Citizens (with provisions for certain categories)

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the IC&SR portal: https://icandsr.iitm.ac.in/careers/current_openings.php
Fill the application carefully. Separate applications required for multiple posts.
Keep a printout of the submitted application for future reference (to be produced at document verification).
important_instructions: All positions are purely contractual. No claim for permanent absorption. Women candidates are encouraged to apply. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For technical issues: [email protected] or 044-2257 8843.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Madras is recruiting 01 Project Associate-I in the Department of Mechanical Engineering on a contractual basis.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_madras_ii: Initially 1 year, extendable based on performance

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.details: 4-year Bachelor’s degree in Natural/Agricultural Sciences OR Master’s degree in Natural/Agricultural Sciences OR Bachelor’s degree in Engineering/Technology/Medicine from a recognized university
Candidates with CSIR-UGC NET / GATE / National Level Exam qualification
Indian Citizens (with provisions for certain categories)

content_sections.heading: Job Description
content_sections.text: Theoretical and experimental study of droplet impact of complex fluids on thin film substrates. Advanced experimental studies on dynamics of complex fluid droplets and development of fluid mechanical & rheological theory. Publish in reputed Q1 journals and present in national/international conferences. Opportunity for upgradation to Project Associate-II after 2 years and conversion to full-time Ph.D. after 3 years.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Madras Project Associate 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must apply online only through the IC&SR portal: https://icandsr.iitm.ac.in/careers/current_openings.php

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: All positions are purely contractual. No claim for permanent absorption. Women candidates are encouraged to apply. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For technical issues: [email protected] or 044-2257 8843.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Madras Project Associate-I 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application submission is 28 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in IIT Madras Mechanical Engineering Recruitment?
faq.answer: 01 vacancy for the post of Project Associate-I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Associate-I at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: ₹37,000/- + HRA for candidates with CSIR-UGC NET/GATE qualification or ₹33,000/- + HRA for others.

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for IIT Madras Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates with 4-year Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Natural/Agricultural Sciences, or equivalent.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIT Madras ANRF Project Associate position?
faq.answer: Apply online through the IC&SR portal https://icandsr.iitm.ac.in/careers/current_openings.php using Advt. No. 129/2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is GATE qualification mandatory for IIT Madras Project Associate?
faq.answer: GATE/NET qualification is not mandatory but preferred as it provides higher emoluments (₹37,000/- + HRA).

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the Project Associate position at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: Initially one year, extendable based on performance. Opportunity for Ph.D. conversion after three years.

faq.question: Q8. Will IIT Madras provide Ph.D. opportunity to selected candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, after three years as Project Associate, candidates can convert to full-time Ph.D. with prior work counting towards the thesis.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job profile for IIT Madras Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: Theoretical & experimental study of droplet impact of complex fluids, fluid mechanics research, and publication in Q1 journals.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for IIT Madras recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the advertisement. The process is completely online.
